name: Rosemon: Burst Mode

signature_move.name: Charité
signature_move.description: Amplifies the aura of its mantle, gently wraps it around the opponent, and then annihilates them.

description: Current Original ⇨ Japanese A Rosemon that has temporarily reached the limits of its abilities through Burst Evolution, it is a unique form which wears an aura of love and beauty. Its Special Moves are amplifying the aura of its mantle, gently wrapping it around the opponent, and then annihilating them ( Charité ), and releasing lasers of a blown kiss from its lips ( Aguichant Lèvres ). Also, it can shoot the " Tiferets " that it wears, jewels engraved with the symbol of love and beauty, at the opponent.
